title: Where It All Began
caption: The day I met you, Kashish, changed my life forever.
quote: Our first glances, our first smiles, and the sudden realization that my world was changing.

title: Under the Summer Downpour
caption: Drenched, cold, but laughing with all our hearts.
quote: Running under a single tiny umbrella, splashing in puddles, and realizing I never wanted to shelter from life's rain with anyone else, Kashish.

title: Spontaneous Road Trips
caption: Interlocking fingers as the sunset chased our car.
quote: No destination, just the open road, our favorite playlist, and the steady warmth of your hand in mine.

title: Our Cozy Winter Cabin
caption: Watching the snow fall while drinking hot cocoa.
quote: Squeezed together under a woolen blanket, drawing up houses and houses of dreams in our diaries, Kashish.

title: The Saree That Speeched Me
caption: You wore a saree, and I completely forgot how to speak.
quote: Standing under the festival lights, looking at you, and thanking the stars for giving me the most gorgeous girl in the universe.

title: Quiet Pier Whispers
caption: Watching the dark ocean waves crash in comfortable silence.
quote: Kashish, sitting there beside you, I realized that home is not a place... it is you.

title: Drawing Sparkler Paths
caption: Drawing glowing shapes under our rooftop stars.
quote: The sparks lit up your beautiful face, and I silently promised to celebrate you every day of my life, Kashish.

title: Celebrating You Today
caption: Happy Birthday, my love. Let's start our forever.
quote: Our story has been beautiful, Kashish... but the best chapters are still waiting to be written. Happy Birthday! ❤️
